title: Supabase CLI command does not generate expected files
description: Running the Supabase NExt.js client setup command does not create the expected client.ts, middleware.ts, and server.ts files in the supabase directory.

title: Supabase hot reload does not update email rate limit configuration
description: Changing the GOTRUE_RATE_LIMIT_EMAIL_SENT environment variable during hot reload does not update the limiter configuration, leaving the previous rate limit values active.

title: SSO redirectTo parameter ignored when authentication fails
description: When using signInWithSSO with a redirectTo parameter, failed authentication redirects to the default SiteURL instead of the provided redirect URL.

title: Supabase preview branches sometimes not created for pull requests
description: Supabase preview branching occasionally fails to create a preview branch for a pull request even when the GitHub integration and settings are configured correctly.

title: Database connection fails with password authentication error for postgres user
description: Users report that connecting to a Supabase database fails with a password authentication error for the postgres user even after resetting the database password.

title: Reports dashboard blocks have styling and layout issues
description: The Supabase Reports dashboard has several UI issues including tooltip text overflow, axis label formatting problems, and inaccessible action buttons in report blocks.

title: ApplePayContextDelegate completion handler fails due to sendable constraint
description: Using Stripe's ApplePayContext delegate with async code produces a sendable closure error, preventing access to the client secret and causing Apple Pay payment creation to fail.

title: StripePayments package missing StripeCore dependency in modular project
description: Including Stripe packages in a modular Swift project causes dependency scan errors where StripePayments cannot locate StripeCore, resulting in build failures.

title: NodeLogQuery endpoint no longer accepts POST requests after Kubernetes upgrade
description: After upgrading Kubernetes to version 1.36, the NodeLogQuery endpoint stopped accepting POST requests and only responds to GET requests, breaking previous API behavior.

title: Redis server crashes when updateClientMemUsageAndBucket runs on non-main thread
description: A Redis server crash occurs when updateClientMemUsageAndBucket executes on a non-main thread even when the GIL is held, triggering a thread assertion failure.

title: Redis keysizes info reports incorrect ZSET item counts
description: After upgrading Redis, the keysizes command reports incorrect or negative values for ZSET item counts, affecting database statistics and monitoring metrics.

title: Kubernetes configz endpoint exposes internal configuration type
description: The cloud-controller-manager configz endpoint returns an internal configuration type instead of a versioned API object, exposing implementation details of the system configuration.

title: UnionPay test card incorrectly marked invalid in Stripe iOS SDK
description: A valid UnionPay test card is flagged as invalid in the Stripe iOS SDK, preventing users from saving the card during the payment flow.

title: Kubernetes Events watch request silently fails with stale resourceVersion
description: A watch request for Events using a stale resourceVersion returns HTTP 200 and closes immediately instead of returning an explicit error, causing clients to silently fail.

title: Redis 8.2.1 instances crash with signal 11 in HA deployment
description: Redis 8.2.1 instances in a high-availability Kubernetes deployment crash with signal 11, and the issue can spread across multiple instances after the first crash occurs.

title: ApplePayContextDelegate completion handler fails due to Swift sendable constraint
description: Using Stripe's ApplePayContext delegate with async code produces a sendable closure error, preventing access to the client secret during the payment flow.

title: SMS OTP login incorrectly recorded as new signup in auth reports
description: When users sign in using SMS OTP, the Supabase dashboard records the event as a new signup instead of a login for existing users.

title: Redis cluster experiences unbounded memory growth under heavy publish load
description: Under high PUBLISH traffic, Redis cluster communication buffers continuously grow and are not reclaimed, eventually leading to an out-of-memory crash.

title: FirebaseUI Auth layout breaks due to Android 15 edge-to-edge enforcement
description: FirebaseUI authentication screens render incorrectly on Android 15 due to the new edge-to-edge UI enforcement, causing layout and visibility issues.

title: FirestorePagingAdapter causes application crash during pagination updates
description: Applications using FirestorePagingAdapter may crash when loading additional records or refreshing data, causing unexpected failures during pagination.

title: Redis CLI ctrl+arrow navigation behaves incorrectly in command line
description: Using ctrl+left or ctrl+right arrow keys in the Redis CLI does not move by word as expected and instead inserts characters into the command input.

title: kube-proxy incorrectly detects IPv6 support when IPv6 is disabled
description: kube-proxy fails to properly detect when IPv6 support is disabled on a node, incorrectly enabling dual-stack mode and causing service binding errors.

title: iOS CardScan view crashes with EXC_BREAKPOINT error
description: Opening the CardScan interface in an iOS application triggers an EXC_BREAKPOINT error when initializing the SimpleScanViewController.

title: Supabase dashboard CSV import fails with large geometry datasets
description: Importing CSV files containing geometry columns with a large number of points causes the Supabase dashboard import process to hang or fail.

title: Supabase email auth hook returns project URL instead of configured SiteURL
description: Email authentication hooks use the Supabase project URL for site_url instead of the configured SiteURL, resulting in incorrect confirmation links.

title: FirestorePagingSource crash due to InterruptedException
description: Applications using FirestorePagingSource may crash with an InterruptedException during lifecycle state retrieval when loading paginated data.

title: StatefulSet rolling update completes before replicas become available
description: Kubernetes StatefulSet rolling updates may finish prematurely because the update logic checks ReadyReplicas but not AvailableReplicas when minReadySeconds is configured.

title: PostgreSQL topology extension not automatically added to search path
description: Installing the PostgreSQL topology extension does not automatically update the search path, causing queries using the extension to fail unless configuration is manually modified.

title: FirebaseUI authentication screen crashes on certain Samsung devices
description: FirebaseUI authentication screens may crash with a RuntimeException on some Samsung devices when rendering display list canvases.

title: FirebaseUI auth provider picker hides buttons due to layout issue
description: The FirebaseUI authentication provider picker screen may hide login buttons when SVG images introduce excess spacing in the scroll view layout.

title: Password reset link expires instantly [AUT-31]
description: Observed in production. users are blocked from signing in. Repro count: 4.

title: OIDC token rejected by auth gateway [AUT-32]
description: Multiple stakeholders reported this today across different tenants. After reviewing logs and support transcripts, we confirmed that authentication fails across multiple orgs. Issue started after a recent deployment and persists despite cache clears.

title: Service account login fails with 401 [AUT-33]
description: Intermittent edge case: only affects long-lived sessions, legacy clients, or orgs with custom settings; however new sessions cannot be established when the boundary condition is met (case #1032).

title: Session timeout too aggressive for analysts [AUT-34]
description: Observed in production. login flow breaks after redirect. Repro count: 7.

title: Admin cannot impersonate user for support [AUT-35]
description: Multiple stakeholders reported this today across different tenants. After reviewing logs and support transcripts, we confirmed that access is denied for valid credentials. Issue started after a recent deployment and persists despite cache clears.

title: Invoice PDF download returns 500 [BIL-01]
description: Observed in production. finance team cannot reconcile charges. Repro count: 1.

title: Duplicate charge after plan upgrade [BIL-02]
description: Multiple stakeholders reported this today across different tenants. After reviewing logs and support transcripts, we confirmed that customers report incorrect billing totals. Issue started after a recent deployment and persists despite cache clears.

title: Proration amount looks incorrect [BIL-03]
description: Intermittent edge case: only affects long-lived sessions, legacy clients, or orgs with custom settings; however payment workflow fails at confirmation when the boundary condition is met (case #1002).

description: Observed in production. subscription status does not match payment. Repro count: 4.
